text: Weapon and abilities [ ]   Execution Holding the charge only tightens the spread. If there is no need to be accurate, for example when you are close up against a large enemy or they are low on health, you can just tap the button to get the damage out quickly.   Joyride Joyride is a very versatile ability, it can help you take even longer flanks really quick, deal quick burst damage to the enemy or run away from a tight spot. You can do a large amount of burst damage by bumping into an enemy and launching the bike at them point blank. Aerial launch grants additional upward movement, which can help you get on high grounds that are inaccessible just by jumping.   Satsuriku Spree Try to initiate the ultimate from side or flank or when the enemy is distracted. Shion has no protections and remains near stationary while bursting, and the enemy can easily focus you down before your first burst even ends if they see you coming. Similar to   Death Blossom , the bursts are not true AoE but instead Shion fires shots toward each target in radius. As such, if you line yourself with enemies, you can force the nearest target to also take shots meant for any enemy, including deployables , directly behind them. This can eliminate most non-tanks in single burst if successful.   Nano Boost and   Tidal Blast are good combo options with Satsuriku Spree. Nano Boost allows one-shotting most non-tanks and Shion can easily deliver Tidal Blast to the enemy with dashes. Additionally, both grant Shion much needed survivability during the ultimate.
